column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting elegantly in a modern cafe" | TEXT="素敵なカフェ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at menu excitedly" | TEXT="どれにしようかな" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Ordering with a smile" | TEXT="これお願いします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a latte art happily" | TEXT="可愛い！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a photo of the drink" | TEXT="写真撮ろっと" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Drinking delicately" | TEXT="美味しい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing contentedly" | TEXT="落ち着く" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a slice of cake" | TEXT="甘くて幸せ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping lips with a napkin gracefully" | TEXT="ごちそうさま"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised by huge pancake" | TEXT="おおっ！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Eyes sparkling" | TEXT="美味しそう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a bite playfully" | TEXT="一口食べる？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly when refused" | TEXT="むー" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing playfully" | TEXT="全部食べちゃうよ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking guilty full stomach" | TEXT="食べすぎた…" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Patting stomach" | TEXT="ぽんぽこりん" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="でも後悔なし！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="大満足"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Working gracefully on a laptop in cafe" | TEXT="作業中" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking tired, rubbing neck" | TEXT="疲れたな" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching arms out" | TEXT="うーんっ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sipping coffee to wake up" | TEXT="シャキッと！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Typing quickly" | TEXT="あと少し" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud of finished work" | TEXT="終わった！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently" | TEXT="お疲れ様" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Closing laptop neatly" | TEXT="帰ろう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving politely" | TEXT="またね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking around confused" | TEXT="ここはどこ？" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Checking map on phone" | TEXT="迷ったみたい" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="ごめん、遅れそう" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Hands together in prayer" | TEXT="本当にごめん！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly" | TEXT="はぁ…" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking relieved seeing friend" | TEXT="あっ！いた！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Running elegantly but quickly" | TEXT="お待たせー！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Catching breath" | TEXT="ふーふー" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely" | TEXT="会えてよかった"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sadly at a rainy cafe window" | TEXT="雨ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Resting chin on hand" | TEXT="退屈だなぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy" | TEXT="眠くなってきた" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping lightly on the table" | TEXT="うとうと…" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up surprised" | TEXT="はっ！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping drool playfully" | TEXT="ヨダレ拭かなきゃ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing awkwardly" | TEXT="あはは…" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out" | TEXT="てへぺろ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing heartily with a friend" | TEXT="あははは！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Covering mouth gracefully while laughing" | TEXT="面白すぎる" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding enthusiastically" | TEXT="わかるわかる！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands in agreement" | TEXT="それな！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking warmly at friend" | TEXT="ずっと話していたい" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sad at the time" | TEXT="もう帰る時間" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="帰りたくないな" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing to say goodbye" | TEXT="今日はありがとう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving happily" | TEXT="またカフェ行こうね"
